description: ESP32-S3 based sensor controller main PCB with integrated power management (USB-C input, BQ24195 battery charger, TPS61088 5V boost, INA219 power monitor), AP2112K 3.3V LDO, TCA9548A I2C multiplexer for 3 sensor modules, and WS2812B LED strip driver with level shifting

power.description: 3.3V LDO regulation on root sheet, fed from +5V boost output
power.notes: AP2112K 3.3V LDO fed from +5V (TPS61088 boost converter output via power management sheet). Powers sensors, I2C bus, and logic.

usb_c_input.description: USB-C 5V power input with fuse protection and CC pull-downs for UFP sink role
usb_c_input.notes: Sink-only USB-C (no PD, no data lines). 3A fuse on VBUS, 5.1k CC pull-downs. No STUSB4500 or USBLC6 for V1 simplicity.

battery_mgmt.description: BQ24195 battery charger/power path manager with PMOS reverse polarity protection, NTC monitoring, and support passives
battery_mgmt.notes: BQ24195 at I2C 0x6B. ILIM=330R (~1.5A ceiling), OTG pulled HIGH for 500mA SDP boot. CE tied LOW (charging controlled via I2C). PMOS Q2 provides battery reverse polarity protection. NTC biased from REGN via R36/R37 divider.

boost_5v.description: TPS61088 synchronous boost converter, VSYS (3.0-4.5V) to +5V for entire system
boost_5v.notes: TPS61088 at 2.2MHz, 5.07V output via 180k/56k feedback divider. PFM mode for battery efficiency. Compensation: 22k/4.7nF/100pF (bench-tunable). 66uF output capacitance (3x 22uF).

power_monitor.description: INA219 I2C power monitor on VSYS rail with 10mR shunt
power_monitor.notes: INA219 at I2C 0x40. PGA /2 mode (+/-80mV), 1mA/LSB resolution, 8A max measurable current. Shunt between VSYS and VSYS_SENSE (boost converter input). Kelvin connection recommended for R44.

power_test_points.description: Test points on power management sheet for VSYS, VBAT, Protected_VBUS, and power ground
power_test_points.notes: 1.5mm pads for probing power rails during bench testing. Root sheet has separate test points for +5V, +3.3V, and GND.

mcu.description: Main system controller (ESP32-S3) and GPIO breakout test points
mcu.notes: T-Display-S3 dev board used temporarily. Long-term plan is bare ESP32-S3 integrated into main PCB. GPIO 21 is BQ24195 CHRG_INT. GPIO 1-3, 17, 18 are unused breakouts for future expansion.

i2c_mux.description: TCA9548A I2C multiplexer subsystem with pull-ups and decoupling
i2c_mux.notes: Routes single upstream I2C bus to 3 downstream channels for sensor boards. Address 0x70 (all address pins grounded). R28/R29 are upstream pull-ups; downstream pull-ups are on sensor boards.

sensor_connectors.description: JST-SH connectors carrying I2C and interrupt signals to three sensor modules
sensor_connectors.notes: Each 5-pin connector provides 3.3V power, GND, I2C SDA/SCL (from TCA9548A channel), and interrupt. Wired to sensor rigid base PCBs which have PCA9546A local muxes.

led_controller.description: LED strip driver with level shifting, power protection, and current sensing
led_controller.notes: Drives 72-LED WS2812B strip. SN74AHCT125 shifts 3.3V data to 5V. Power path: +5V -> F1 (3A fuse) -> R27 (0.1 ohm sense) -> +5V_TO_LEDS. J3 is on root sheet but functionally part of this block.

C1.function: Input bypass capacitor for U1 voltage regulator

C2.function: Output stabilization capacitor for U1 voltage regulator

C20.function: High-frequency bypass on Protected_VBUS, close to U5 VBUS pins

C31.function: VIN pin bypass capacitor, close to U6 pin 9

C40.function: INA219 VS supply bypass, close to U7 pin 4

C41.function: VIN power stage bulk input capacitor

C7.function: High-frequency bypass capacitor on intermediate LED power node (between fuse F1 and sense resistor R27)

C8.function: Bulk decoupling capacitor on +5V_TO_LEDS rail, stabilizes LED strip power
C8.critical_specs: 10uF, 0603, placed near IC1 VCC and LED strip connector

F1.function: Overcurrent protection fuse on +5V LED strip power path
F1.critical_specs: 3A rated, 1206 package, protects against LED strip short circuit

IC1.function: Quad bus buffer/level shifter, shifts LED data signal from 3.3V MCU logic to 5V WS2812B logic
IC1.critical_specs: AHCT family (3.3V input compatible with 5V VCC), only 1 of 4 buffers used (1A->1Y)

J3.function: JST-PH connector to WS2812B LED strip (72 LEDs, 1.2m), carries power and data

J4.function: JST-SH connector to sensor module 1 (M1, 6 oclock position), carries I2C CH0 + INT1

J5.function: JST-SH connector to sensor module 2 (M2, 9 oclock position), carries I2C CH1 + INT2

J6.function: JST-SH connector to sensor module 3 (M3, 3 oclock position), carries I2C CH2 + INT3

J7.function: USB-C power input connector, 5V sink-only (no data)
J7.critical_specs: TYPE-C-31-M-12, 5.1k CC pull-downs for UFP sink role

J8.critical_specs: JST PH 2-pin, reverse polarity protected by Q2

L2.critical_specs: 2.2uH 10A Isat, FXL0630-2R2-M, minimize trace to U6 SW/VIN

Q2.critical_specs: PMOS SOT-23, D=BAT_RAW S=VBAT, biased by R33/R34 divider

R27.function: Current sense resistor in LED strip +5V power path, enables measuring LED strip current draw

R28.function: I2C SDA pull-up on upstream bus between MCU and TCA9548A

R29.function: I2C SCL pull-up on upstream bus between MCU and TCA9548A

R30.function: USB-C CC1 pull-down for UFP sink detection
R30.critical_specs: 5.1k, required by USB-C spec for sink role

R31.function: USB-C CC2 pull-down for UFP sink detection
R31.critical_specs: 5.1k, required by USB-C spec for sink role

R32.function: BQ24195 ILIM resistor, sets hardware input current ceiling

R33.function: PMOS gate bias resistor to VBAT (keeps Q2 on when battery present)

R34.function: PMOS gate bias resistor to BAT_RAW (turns Q2 off if reverse polarity)

R35.function: OTG pin pull-up to +3.3V, sets 500mA SDP boot-time current

R36.function: NTC bias top resistor (REGN to TS), part of temperature monitoring divider

R37.function: NTC bias bottom resistor (TS to GND), parallel with TH1
R37.critical_specs: 30k, replace with 10k if TH1 not populated

R41.function: Switching frequency set resistor (FSW to SW)

R42.function: Peak current limit set resistor (ILIM to GND)

R44.function: VSYS current sense shunt resistor between VSYS and VSYS_SENSE

R6.function: Active-low reset pull-up for TCA9548A, keeps mux out of reset by default

TH1.function: Battery temperature monitoring NTC for BQ24195 TS input
TH1.critical_specs: 10k NTC, biased by R36/R37 divider from REGN

TP1.function: VSYS rail test point (BQ24195 system output, 3.0-4.5V)

TP2.function: VBAT rail test point (battery voltage after PMOS)

TP3.function: Protected_VBUS test point (USB VBUS after fuse)

TPIO21.function: BQ24195 interrupt (CHRG_INT) test point, GPIO 21 active-low

U1.function: 3.3V LDO regulator for sensor and I2C bus power

U2.function: Main system controller (LilyGO T-Display-S3 ESP32-S3 dev board with LCD), runs sensor acquisition on Core 0 and networking on Core 1
U2.critical_specs: ESP32-S3, dual-core 240MHz, WiFi+BT, built-in 1.9in LCD, PSRAM

U4.function: TCA9548A 8-channel I2C multiplexer, routes MCU I2C bus to 3 sensor board channels

U5.function: Battery charger and power path manager, provides VSYS from USB or battery
U5.critical_specs: BQ24195RGER, I2C 0x6B, 4.2V charge, ILIM 330R for ~1.5A ceiling, OTG HIGH for 500mA SDP boot

U6.function: Synchronous boost converter, VSYS to +5V for entire system

U7.function: I2C power monitor on VSYS rail, measures voltage and current

+3.3V.description: Regulated 3.3V rail from AP2112K LDO, powers sensors and I2C bus

+5V.description: Main 5V rail from TPS61088 boost converter (power management sheet), powers MCU, AP2112K LDO input, and LED controller

/I2C_SCL.description: Upstream I2C clock line between MCU (GPIO 44) and TCA9548A

/I2C_SDA.description: Upstream I2C data line between MCU (GPIO 43) and TCA9548A

/INT1.description: Interrupt line from sensor module 1 (M1) to MCU GPIO 13

/INT2.description: Interrupt line from sensor module 2 (M2) to MCU GPIO 12

/INT3.description: Interrupt line from sensor module 3 (M3) to MCU GPIO 11

/LED Controller/+5V_TO_LEDS.description: Fused and sense-resistored +5V for LED strip, from F1->R27 chain

/LED Controller/DATA_IN.description: LED data signal at 3.3V logic from MCU GPIO 16 to level shifter input

/LED Controller/DATA_TO_LEDS.description: LED data signal at 5V logic from level shifter output to LED strip

/Power Management/BAT_RAW.description: Battery+ before PMOS protection, from J8 connector

/Power Management/BOOST_BOOT.description: TPS61088 BOOT pin, C32 to BOOST_SW

/Power Management/BOOST_COMP.description: TPS61088 compensation pin, R43 and C39

/Power Management/BOOST_FSW.description: TPS61088 FSW pin, R41 (100k) to BOOST_SW sets ~2.2MHz

/Power Management/BOOST_ILIM.description: TPS61088 ILIM pin, R42 (100k) to GND sets ~11.9A peak

/Power Management/BOOST_SS.description: TPS61088 soft-start pin, C37 (47nF) to GND (~11ms ramp)

/Power Management/BOOST_VCC.description: TPS61088 internal LDO output, C33 (2.2uF) bypass

/Power Management/BQ_BTST.description: BQ24195 bootstrap pin, C23 (47nF) to BQ_SW

/Power Management/BQ_ILIM.description: BQ24195 ILIM pin, R32 (330R) to GND sets ~1.5A ceiling

/Power Management/BQ_PMID.description: BQ24195 PMID (internal power mux output), C25+C26 = 20uF

/Power Management/BQ_REGN.description: BQ24195 internal 5V LDO output, C24 bypass, R36 NTC bias source

/Power Management/BQ_SW.description: BQ24195 switching node, L1 and C23 connected

/Power Management/BQ_TS.description: BQ24195 TS thermistor node, TH1/R36/R37 divider from REGN

/Power Management/CC1.description: USB-C CC1 pin to R30 (5.1k) pull-down for UFP sink

/Power Management/CC2.description: USB-C CC2 pin to R31 (5.1k) pull-down for UFP sink

/Power Management/CHRG_INT.description: BQ24195 INT (active-low, open-drain), R38 pull-up to +3.3V, routed to GPIO 21

/Power Management/COMP_MID.description: R43-C38 series junction in TPS61088 compensation network

/Power Management/OTG_BIAS.description: BQ24195 OTG pin, R35 (10k) pull-up to +3.3V for 500mA SDP boot

/Power Management/PMOS_GATE.description: Q2 gate, R33 (100k) to VBAT / R34 (100k) to BAT_RAW divider

/Power Management/Protected_VBUS.description: VBUS after 3A fuse F2, BQ24195 input, C20/C21/C22 decoupled

/Power Management/VBAT.description: Battery+ after PMOS Q2, BQ24195 BAT pins

/Power Management/VSYS.description: BQ24195 system output (3.0-4.5V), C27/C28/C29 decoupled, INA219 IN+ side

/Power Management/VSYS_SENSE.description: VSYS after INA219 shunt R44, TPS61088 VIN/EN input, C31/C41 decoupled

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH0_SCL.description: TCA9548A channel 0 SCL to sensor module 1 (J4)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH0_SDA.description: TCA9548A channel 0 SDA to sensor module 1 (J4)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH1_SCL.description: TCA9548A channel 1 SCL to sensor module 2 (J5)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH1_SDA.description: TCA9548A channel 1 SDA to sensor module 2 (J5)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH2_SCL.description: TCA9548A channel 2 SCL to sensor module 3 (J6)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/CH2_SDA.description: TCA9548A channel 2 SDA to sensor module 3 (J6)

/TCA9548A_Subsystem/TCA_RESET.description: Active-low reset for TCA9548A, driven by MCU GPIO 10, held high by R6 pull-up

Net-(C7-Pad2).description: Intermediate node in LED power path between fuse F1 and sense resistor R27

Net-(U2-1).description: MCU GPIO 1 breakout (unused, test point only)

Net-(U2-17).description: MCU GPIO 17 breakout (unused, test point only)

Net-(U2-18).description: MCU GPIO 18 breakout (unused, test point only)

Net-(U2-2).description: MCU GPIO 2 breakout (unused, test point only)

Net-(U2-3).description: MCU GPIO 3 breakout (unused, test point only)
